title: Fix usage of absolute windows paths with --image-path
body:
Fixes: #15995

Only assume that http(s) scheme URLs (only ones supported by http.Client anyway) are URLs. Treat everything else as a file path. (Windows paths can look like a URL scheme)

```release-note
Fixed usage of absolute image paths on Windows when specified with --image-path on machine init
```

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body:
PTAL @ashley-cui @baude 

Note: this does also affect macos codepath. Let me know if you have any concerns. I did double check both behave as expected.
